statement: This record remains negative evidence on build 26100: the repo did not produce enough supporting proof to promote it into a normal actionable surface.
gating_reason: Archived audit trail only. Keep this out of the normal tweak surface.

links.title: Microsoft Learn: Guidance on configuring system services - Print Workflow Service
links.summary: Microsoft lists Print Workflow `(PrintWorkflowUserSvc)` with start mode `Manual` and marks it `No guidance`, noting that some printing functions might not work successfully if it is turned off.

links.title: Local SCM snapshot - PrintWorkflowUserSvc instance
links.summary: Checked-in `sc qc PrintWorkflowUserSvc_7598c` snapshot from Microsoft Windows 11 Pro 10.0.26200 confirming a live instantiated per-user PrintWorkflowUserSvc service, its display name, binary path, and current START_TYPE line on the review host. This anchors the wildcard app mapping to a real service instance.

links.title: Current app implementation
links.summary: The provider disables instantiated `PrintWorkflowUserSvc_*` services through the batch service start-mode tweak.
